annotations.label: Quasiperiodicity of theta functions

anchor.snippet: making it a quasiperiodic function

annotations.note: jacobiTheta₂_add_left' states θ(z+τ,τ) = cexp(-πi(τ+2z))·θ(z,τ), the quasiperiodicity relation.

annotations.label: Jacobi theta function

anchor.snippet: is a function defined for two complex variables z and τ

annotations.note: jacobiTheta₂ is defined exactly as the two-variable Jacobi theta function in z and τ.

annotations.label: 1-periodicity in z

anchor.snippet: the theta function is 1-periodic in z

annotations.note: jacobiTheta₂_add_left proves jacobiTheta₂ (z+1) τ = jacobiTheta₂ z τ.

annotations.label: τ-quasiperiodicity in z

anchor.snippet: it is also τ -quasiperiodic in z

annotations.note: jacobiTheta₂_add_left' gives the τ-quasiperiodicity θ(z+τ,τ) = cexp(-πi(τ+2z))·θ(z,τ).

annotations.label: General quasiperiodicity relation

anchor.snippet: for any integers a and b

annotations.note: Mathlib has the unit generators (jacobiTheta₂_add_left and add_left') but not the combined θ(z+a+bτ,τ) relation for arbitrary integers a,b.
